filesystem.description: Repo-scoped file access. Claude + Codex both use.

github.description: GitHub API — PRs, issues, branches. Claude orchestrates.

_design.control_plane: Claude — orchestration, architecture, PR review, task delegation
_design.execution_plane: Codex — scoped feature implementation, file edits, tests
_design.trust_boundary: Codex never pushes to main. Claude approves merges.
